---
name: Citation error (book / chapter / tip)
about: Report a chapter, tip, or section citation that is incorrect.
title: "[citation] "
labels: ["citation", "documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## The citation as written

File and line number where the citation appears:

```
<e.g. SKILL.md:204 — "(Brooks.) "
        anti-patterns/07-premature-abstraction.md:71 — "Ousterhout (2nd ed.), ch. 19">
```

Quote the exact citation text.

## Why it's wrong

What does the cited book/chapter actually contain? Where would the correct citation point? Cite a verifiable source (publisher URL, author's site, GitHub-hosted free text like abseil.io/resources/swe-book).

## Suggested correction

```
<the corrected citation, ready to paste>
```

## Verification source

URL or screenshot of the authoritative source you used to determine the error.
